page_content: #collegerequirementstext) Required Courses GEOG201 Geography of Environmental Systems 4 & GEOG211 and Geography of Environmental Systems Laboratory GEOG202 Introduction to Human Geography 3 GEOG212 Career Planning for Geographical Sciences, GIS, 1 and ENSP Majors Select one upper-level physical geography course 3 Select one upper-level human geography course 3 Select three credits of upper-level geography electives 3 GEOG306 Introduction to Quantitative Methods for the 3 Geographical Environmental Sciences GEOG272 Introduction to Earth Observation Science 3 GEOG276 Principles of Python Programming and 3 Geocomputing GEOG373 Geographic Information Systems 3 Six credits from the following list: 6 GEOG416 Conceptualizing and Modeling Human- Environmental Interactions GEOG470 Algorithms for Geospatial Computing GEOG472 Remote Sensing: Digital Processing and Analysis GEOG473 Geographic Information Systems and Spatial Analysis GEOG475 Geographic Visualization and Digital Mapping GEOG476 Object-Oriented Computer Programming for GIS GEOG477 Supporting Courses MATH120 Elementary Calculus I 3
